# Kiran

Canonical URL: https://kiranmagic7.github.io/
GitHub: https://github.com/kiranmagic7
Profile README: https://github.com/kiranmagic7/kiranmagic7

Kiran is a developer-tool reliability engineer and open-source contributor focused on agentic engineering tools.

Core work areas:
- Usage meters and provider utilization systems
- CLI integrations and subprocess behavior
- Runtime, sandbox, and session boundaries
- Editor state, Markdown, MDX, and table behavior
- Config diagnostics and documentation correctness
- Research infrastructure with source traceability

Public proof:
- 29 public upstream pull requests merged since February 2026
- 16 merged CodexBar pull requests
- Merged work across CodexBar, OpenClaw, Crabbox, gogcli, Plate, Rueidis, Rushstack, tokentally, Vercel AI, Langflow, and MCP TypeScript SDK

Selected pull requests:
- Claude CLI rate-limit handling in CodexBar: https://github.com/steipete/CodexBar/pull/1685
- Provider utilization history in CodexBar: https://github.com/steipete/CodexBar/pull/1588
- Modal run-session handles in Crabbox: https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/452
- E2B run-session handles in Crabbox: https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/451
- MDX table preservation in Plate: https://github.com/udecode/plate/pull/5007
- Redis array command builders in Rueidis: https://github.com/redis/rueidis/pull/1002

Short description:
Kiran builds small, tested fixes for developer tools where reliability problems quietly waste engineering time.
